title: Privacy Options
description: Per-installation privacy preferences. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.privacy` per `persistence.md`. Surfaced via screen 56 (Privacy pane). Wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`.

displayNameMode.description: When `hashed`, save metadata stores `playerHash` + `playerLabel`; `playerName` is omitted. When `clear` (opt-in only), `playerName` is stored cleartext per `data-inventory.md`.

analyticsOptIn.description: Opt-in for analytics. v1 loads no SDK; this toggle declares the default so the first SDK integrator cannot regress it.

allowMatureContent.description: Mature-content gate. Bound to `config.player.allowMatureContent` per `pack-trust.md` § Content Rating.

saltFingerprint.description: First 4 hex chars of the local salt; user-visible verification that `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA` rotated it.

analyticsClientId.description: Optional UUIDv4. Not generated at v1; reserved so a future analytics integration cannot bypass the opt-in toggle.
